summary: Schadenfreude is a beast—and momentum investors are on the receiving end now. Momentum, the practice of buying the market’s best-performing stocks based on the premise they will stay the best performers, is a wonderful investing strategy when it’s working in your favor. The returns are fantastic—the Invesco S&P 500 Momentum exchange-traded fund has returned 42% a year for the past three years, more than double the SPDR S&P 500 ETF’s 20% annual return.
content: Schadenfreude is a beast—and momentum investors are on the receiving end now. Momentum, the practice of buying the market’s best-performing stocks based on the premise they will stay the best performers, is a wonderful investing strategy when it’s working in your favor. The returns are fantastic—the Invesco S&P 500 Momentum exchange-traded fund has returned 42% a year for the past three years, more than double the SPDR S&P 500 ETF’s 20% annual return.
chineseSummary: 幸灾乐祸是一头野兽——动量投资者现在正处于接收端。动量投资是一种以市场上表现最好的股票将保持最佳表现为前提而买入的做法，当它对你有利时，这是一种极好的投资策略。回报率非常惊人——Invesco S&P 500 Momentum 交易所交易基金在过去三年中的年回报率为 42%，是 SPDR S&P 500 ETF 20% 年回报率的两倍多。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
